title: Masdevallia apoloae
taxonomy: Masdevallia apoloae is classified within the family Orchidaceae, which is the largest family of flowering plants. The genus Masdevallia itself is a part of the subtribe Dryadinae. This orchid species is native to the Andean region of South America and is known for its unique and delicate flowers. The species is also classified as a type of epiphytic orchid, meaning it grows on other plants without harming them. Within the orchid family, Masdevallia apoloae is further classified as a species within the section Masdevallia.
